scope: Canonical reconciliation for stale PURG-01 next-step after artifact-only completion. Governance/documentation only; no real execution, no remediation, no finding close.
stale_next_step_reason: ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json still preserves execute_purg01_controlled_triage_artifact_only as the latest completed next recommended step even though the artifact-only execution artifacts already exist and the reported CI state is terminal green.
active_context_state_unchanged_reason: ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SCHEMA.json has additionalProperties false and scripts/validate_active_context_state.py still expects execute_purg01_controlled_triage_artifact_only as the live next-step token; changing the state here would introduce structural and validator risk outside reconciliation scope.
blocked_reason: No unambiguous live next step can be derived without operator direction. PURG-02 cannot be opened automatically, remediation is not authorized, finding close is not authorized, and the macro transition candidate is explicitly documental_not_active.
